description: Stage 0.5 BUILD (the existing-step re-scope e-0036/a-0035 identified): recover the residual full proof bodies for the 633 data/deep wide-frontier targets by re-running the EXISTING extract_full_proofs step over the 452 deep modules (deep_wide_targets.json['modules']), then join the recovered bodies with the have_tree frontiers via the e-0033 same-format serializer to emit construct-valid, same-format (both-tactic-mode) pi_root (rough) / pi_leaf (fine) training pairs. No new extractor: extract_full_proofs already accepts a CSV  override and already emits full residual bodies with multi-have blocks intact (e-0036).
motivation: e-0036/a-0035 confirmed 0/633 deep bodies are on disk (Modal required) AND that the recovery is a re-scope of CLAUDE.md pipeline step 4, not a new tool. This is the concrete, unspent paid step that unblocks q-0007's construct-valid deep granularity retrain and q-0009's section-predictor: produce the same-format deep corpus whose data-level validity (construct e-0032, length e-0033/e-0034, renderability e-0035, on-domain supply e-0029/e-0031) is already established.

code_pointer.run_cmd: modal app list  # bail if 2+ project apps running; then: modal run --detach modal/extract_corpus.py::extract_full_proofs --modules "$(python3 -c 'import json;print(",".join(json.load(open("data/corpus_v3/deep_wide_targets.json"))["modules"]))')"  # then modal volume get + join via e-0033 serializer

formal_results: PLANNED — not run. Blocked on Modal credit (free tier; CLAUDE.md cost discipline). Scope: 452 deep modules to extract_full_proofs; ~558 of 633 targets expected to round-trip (e-0028 per-area projection), ~126 of those both verified AND eval-relevant for miniF2F (e-0029), or the full ~558 usable on a within-deep held-out eval (e-0031, ~442 verified train).
results_description: PLANNED — no results. This experiment's run-cmd re-runs the existing extract_full_proofs over the deep modules and is gated behind Modal cost discipline; do not launch without budget authorization and a modal app list check.
conclusions: PLANNED. On completion: a same-format deep (rough,fine) corpus with the term-vs-tactic format confound zero by construction (e-0033) and the granularity construct present in 95.4% of targets (e-0032) — the construct-valid corpus q-0007's headline and q-0009's section-predictor need. Until run, q-0007/q-0009's empirical payload stays a placeholder.
